name: MiniMax MCP
description: Official MiniMax AI MCP server — generate speech from text, clone voices, create images and videos, and compose music via a single interface.

skills.name: Text to Speech
skills.description: Converts text to natural-sounding audio using a library of built-in voices or custom voice profiles.

skills.name: Voice Cloning
skills.description: Clones a voice from provided audio files and uses it to synthesize new speech in the same vocal style.

skills.name: Video Generation
skills.description: Generates short videos from text prompts using the MiniMax-Hailuo model with 6s or 10s duration and HD output.

skills.name: Music Generation
skills.description: Composes original music tracks from a text prompt and lyrics using the music-1.5 model for high-quality audio.
